title: L'odeur Vill Reed Diffuser Set, 100ml Vanilla Scented Diffuser with Sticks Home Fragrance for Bedroom Bathroom Living Room, Home & Office Decor
features: Vanilla:The vanilla essential oil has a sweet, rich, and warm flavor. The smell of Vanilla tends to trigger happy memories, which can elevate the mood and promote a general sense of well-being. This is mostly due to the fact that smelling it reminds you of food and instantly makes you feel excited.

Includes: 1* fragrance diffuser glass bottle with 100ML essential oils fragrance, 6* Reed diffuser sticks,1 exquisite greeting card， 1* Exquisite gift box. You can choose to add or remove the number of reed diffuser sticks to match your taste.
Long-lasting Scent: Enjoy up to 60 days of fragrant aroma. Once the reeds absorb the fragrance and release it in the air, it will subtly diffuse the scent across the room for weeks.
Ideal Gift: Perfect for yourself, family, and friends for any occasion, including holidays, birthdays, housewarming parties, dinner parties, and thank you gifts
Relieve Stress in Any Room: Enjoy pleasant aroma and decorate your indoor or outdoor space, including your home, office, bedroom, kitchen, living room, bathroom, and outdoor patio.
